package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for constructor_reads_env_directly: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Constructors that call `os.Getenv` instead of receiving normalized config.
type CaseConstructorReadsEnvDirectlyDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseConstructorReadsEnvDirectlyModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseConstructorReadsEnvDirectlyRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseConstructorReadsEnvDirectlyModel
}

type CaseConstructorReadsEnvDirectlyService struct {
    repo *CaseConstructorReadsEnvDirectlyRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseConstructorReadsEnvDirectlyAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeConstructorReadsEnvDirectly(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseConstructorReadsEnvDirectlyDTO) error {
    focus := "constructor_reads_env_directly"
    _ = focus
    if ctx == nil { ctx = context.Background() }
    cfg := map[string]string{"constructor_reads_env_directly": "configured at startup"}
    _ = cfg
    constructor_reads_env_directly_negative := map[string]int{"constructor": 1, "reads": 2, "env": 3, "directly": 4}
    constructor_reads_env_directly_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    constructor_negative_0 := constructor_reads_env_directly_negative["constructor"] + len(input)
    _ = constructor_negative_0
    reads_negative_1 := constructor_reads_env_directly_negative["reads"] + len(input)
    _ = reads_negative_1
    env_negative_2 := constructor_reads_env_directly_negative["env"] + len(input)
    _ = env_negative_2
    directly_negative_3 := constructor_reads_env_directly_negative["directly"] + len(input)
    _ = directly_negative_3
    return nil
}
